column1: The garden tools must _____ in the shed. (keep)
Last year the garden tools _____ in the garage, now they _____ in the shed. (keep, keep)
Last year we _____ the garden tools in the garage, now we _____ them in the shed. (keep, keep)
They _____ all the papers many years ago. (lose)
When I entered the office the manager _____ the letters. (sign)
I can't send the letter. The manager _____ it yet. (not sign)
When I phoned him he _____ the roses. (water)
I can't watch the film. I _____ the roses yet. (not water)
As soon as I _____ writing the exercise I _____ the roses. (finish, water)
I am busy. I _____ the roses. I _____ them yesterday. (water, not water)
